reviews.review_description:
LOL..,
Worked in the food and beverage field for many years and this game took me back.

Laughed alot watching myself fumbling trying to keep up with the orders, dropping food, plates, throwing completed orders on the belt. 
Had a ball... good game though I didn't get very far in the game.

I RECOMMEND it to anyone who's been there and just needs a laugh!

reviews.review_title: Can't play with my Quest 2 controllers
reviews.review_description:
I cannot pick up items, cut, or do anything with my controllers.  I can only open & close certain doors. Will this be fixed soon? If not, I will need a full refund.

UPDATE: The controllers work great once I opened the store. Thank you very much. It's a fun game :)

developer_response.body:
Sorry for the inconvenience. However, the game has been tested by other users and the Oculus team. All features are working. Probably you haven't started the game yet. Please select "START GAME" from the front screen and choose a game mode: "ENDLESS MODE", "TIME ATTACK", "FREE MODE" or "NINJA MODE". Then, customers will come to the restaurant after clicking "Open Restaurant".
 
Sending a video about it: https://youtu.be/C1oyciJWvkM
